top_headline: WARSH CORNERED, HUANG AIRBORNE — CPI 3.8% locks hike risk; NVDA CEO boards Air Force One for Beijing
chapters: I · MACRO — CPI April 3.8% YoY (vs 3.7% est); hottest since May 2023; Core 2.8%; Energy +17.9% YoY; TNX 4.46% 1-yr high; Warsh inherits fire May 15
I · MACRO — CME FedWatch: 58% zero cuts 2026; 30-35% rate-hike probability by Dec; June hold ~98%; SPX −0.16%, NDX −0.71%, SOXX −5%
II · AI TRADE — Jensen Huang initially excluded from Beijing delegation; Trump called personally; Huang boards Air Force One from Alaska; NVDA reverses to ~$219-220
II · AI TRADE — SOXX −5% May 12: QCOM −11% (worst since 2020), INTC −8%, ON −6%; valuation compression on CPI; Michael Burry bubble warning
III · GEOPOLITICS — Trump-Xi summit starts May 14; 17 CEOs (Musk, Cook, Fink, Huang); Boeing 500 planes; rare earths; Iran dominating agenda
IV · GEOPOLITICS — Trump rejects Iran 30-day ceasefire proposal as 'piece of garbage'; Pentagon eyes Operation Sledgehammer; Brent $107.05; $29B war cost
V · TRACK RECORD — No-004 (5 May) 6-day review: AMD +24.6% WIN / PLTR −7.0% LOSS / BRENT −5.7% LOSS / 1W 2L avg +3.9%

flagged_setups.thesis: Updated pre-earnings thesis with Beijing binary. NVDA now has two potential catalysts before May 20 Q1 FY2027 earnings: (1) China export relief signal from Trump-Xi summit — Huang told SCSP the ban 'largely backfired'; any softening on H200-class restrictions = China revenue restoration; (2) Beat-and-raise on $78.5B revenue consensus (+79% YoY, $1.77 EPS) with AMD's $10.25B Q1 +38% confirming DC demand floor. Compound bull case: China relief + NVDA beat = significant re-rating. Risk: stock historically sells off post-earnings even on beats; SOXX −5% May 12 reset sentiment; hot CPI raises discount rate; QCOM −11% shows valuation is not bulletproof.
flagged_setups.price_note: $219.44 NVDA close May 12 2026 — confirmed via FX Leaders / Yahoo Finance

watchlist_hits.event: T-7 to May 20 Q1 FY2027 earnings; CEO Huang joins Air Force One for Beijing after Trump call; China chip ban 'largely backfired' per Huang; stock reversed premarket dip from $214.34 to close ~$219-220

narrative_threads: Warsh inheritance reaches critical mass: Takes chair May 15 inheriting CPI 3.8%, PCE 4.5%, ISM Prices 84.6%, TNX 4.46%, Brent $107 — rate-hike probability now structural, not tail-risk

NVDA Beijing binary: Huang's last-minute AF-1 invitation transforms May 20 earnings from single-catalyst to dual-catalyst setup; China export relief from Trump-Xi could move NVDA before earnings week begins
PLTR valuation ceiling — third cycle confirmed: Three consecutive post-earnings selloffs despite fundamental beats; ~200x forward PE ceiling institutionally enforced
SOXX −5% inflection: Worst session since early 2026 on CPI; NVDA only major name recovering same day; AI-centric vs legacy semi divergence is structural
Iran deal — no deal: 'Piece of garbage' rejection and Operation Sledgehammer contingency push Citi end-May thesis to June or later; Brent $107 is ceasefire-in-crisis level
